label.description: Floating label text shown above the input when focused or filled.

helperText.description: Helper line shown below the input.

errorText.description: Error message shown in place of the helper when set. Triggers error styling.

variant.description: Visual style. 'filled' uses a subtle background; 'underlined' shows only the bottom rule.

leadingIcon.description: Icon shown before the input field.

trailingIcon.description: Icon shown after the input field.

invalid.description: Force error styling without an error message.

rootClassName.description: Additional CSS class for the wrapper element.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the underlying <input>.
